scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,electron "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 http://127.0.0.1:8000/health && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 npm --workspace electron run dev
scripts.build: npm --workspace frontend run build && npm --workspace electron run build
